decisions.decision: Phase 3 PARITY-07 (/scoring/insertion_event) DEFERRED — no live analog in aic_eval container. Phase 4 will revisit when CheatCode trial reveals if it's actually consumed.
decisions.rationale: Plan 03-01 live snapshot 2026-05-05 confirmed /scoring/* topics never advertised in live aic_eval; they are sample_config.yaml ghosts.

decisions.decision: Phase 3 PARITY-08 RE-SCOPED from /scoring/tf to /objects_poses_real (tf2_msgs/TFMessage). Isaac Sim is the EXPECTED PUBLISHER (live aic_eval has subscriber but no publisher).
decisions.rationale: Live capture shows /objects_poses_real exists with subscriber=grasp_points_publisher and publisher=0; awaiting external fill. CLAUDE.md topic-parity-as-architectural-law principle applied.

decisions.decision: SCENE-05 cable physics = NVIDIA RigidBodyRopeDemo template values verbatim (density=5e-5, damping=10.0, stiffness=1.0, drives on rotY+rotZ only).
decisions.rationale: Source: ~/env_isaaclab/.../omni.physxdemos/scenes/RigidBodyRopeDemo.py. Cable is articulated chain (omni.physx.tensors warning confirmed); set_world_poses on child links is no-op as expected. Real verification = Phase 4 CheatCode trial.

decisions.decision: Plug-end link = /World/UR5e/cable/Rope/Rope/link_20 (closest to /World/UR5e/cable/sc_plug_visual at d=0.033m per Plan 03-01 probe). Cable spans link_0 (anchor) → link_20 (plug-end), 21 links in live view (53 in offline file).
